entity.summary: Onchain liquidity and token-launch protocol that began with a floor-backed AMM experiment on Blast in 2024 and later evolved through Base deployments and the Mercury curve architecture.
entity.notes: HEI models Baseline as one protocol-level exchange entity across versions and chains. The launch date is normalized to 2024-01-01 because first-party history identifies the first Blast deployment in 2024 without preserving an exact day. Current documentation and product updates support active status.

events.title: Baseline V1 launched on Blast
events.description: Baseline began public operation with its first floor-backed token and liquidity design on Blast.
events.notes: The exact day was not recovered; the event is normalized to the start of the first-party documented 2024 launch year.

events.title: Baseline introduced the Mercury curve
events.description: Baseline published Mercury, a new AMM curve designed around circulating supply and protocol-owned token liquidity.
events.notes: Recorded as a major protocol-generation milestone within the continuing Baseline entity.

evidence.title: The Evolution of Baseline
evidence.notes: First-party history identifies V1 as an experiment launched on Blast in 2024 and describes the later Base versions.

evidence.title: Mercury: A New Curve Primitive For On-chain Token Liquidity
evidence.notes: First-party technical announcement introduces the Mercury curve and its design goals.

evidence.title: Baseline documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes token-owned liquidity, launch automation, staking, borrowing, and exchange mechanics.

evidence.title: Baseline application
evidence.notes: The official protocol application remains available.

evidence.title: Baseline (Base) exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current market profile corroborates the Base deployment and exchange identity.
